reason: This image is not suitable for representing Cambridge Analytica in 2018 due to the presence of anachronistic elements. The image contains large digital displays, modern office furniture (plastic chairs, tables) and modern clothing styles and cuts. The office architecture and lighting are also far too modern. The air conditioning unit in the ceiling is also a modern feature. The presence of digital displays, modern furniture, and the modern cut of clothing clearly places this image in the present day, failing to capture the historical context of 2018.
